name: fern-wifi-cracker
title: fern-wifi-cracker
description:
Automated Wi-Fi cracker
This package contains a Wireless security auditing and
attack software program written using the Python
Programming Language and the Python Qt GUI library, the
program is able to crack and recover WEP/WPA/WPS keys and
also run other network based attacks on wireless or
ethernet based networks.

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for fern-wifi-cracker.
arguments.raw: -wifi-cracker  Option present in package usage line for fern-wifi-cracker.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use fern-wifi-cracker because Automated Wi-Fi cracker.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use fern-wifi-cracker as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `fern-wifi-cracker [options] [args]` as documented upstream for fern-wifi-cracker.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair fern-wifi-cracker with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `fern-wifi-cracker --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
